search_document:
User Request: Largest orders.

Dashboard Components:
Title: Largest Orders
Type: table
Description: List of largest orders by total value
Title: Monthly Revenue Trend
Type: chart
Description: Monthly revenue trend from largest orders
Title: Total Revenue from Largest Orders
Type: kpi
Description: Total revenue generated from the largest orders

sql_queries.title: Largest Orders
sql_queries.description: List of largest orders by total value
sql_queries.sql: SELECT o.OrderID, o.CustomerID, o.OrderDate, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalValue FROM Orders o JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY o.OrderID ORDER BY TotalValue DESC LIMIT 10

sql_queries.title: Monthly Revenue Trend
sql_queries.description: Monthly revenue trend from largest orders
sql_queries.sql: SELECT strftime('%Y-%m', o.OrderDate) AS OrderMonth, SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS MonthlyRevenue FROM Orders o JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY OrderMonth ORDER BY OrderMonth

sql_queries.title: Total Revenue from Largest Orders
sql_queries.description: Total revenue generated from the largest orders
sql_queries.sql: SELECT SUM(TotalValue) AS TotalRevenue FROM (SELECT SUM(od.UnitPrice * od.Quantity * (1 - od.Discount)) AS TotalValue FROM Orders o JOIN "Order Details" od ON o.OrderID = od.OrderID GROUP BY o.OrderID ORDER BY TotalValue DESC LIMIT 10)
